# Release 0.3.8

This is a mock changelog entry for the Polywise website migration.

## Added

- Workers-ready website runtime via vinext
- Safe MDX rendering path
- Locale-prefixed routing for English, Chinese, and Japanese

## Improved

- Better separation between layout, content, and deployment concerns
- More predictable content loading for docs, blog, and changelog pages

## Notes

The exact product release history will be filled in later.
